sentences.target: おじいさんが親切にして、財布を拾ってくれた。
sentences.reading: おじいさんがしんせつにして、さいふをひろってくれた。

translations.en: An old man kindly picked up the wallet.
translations.es: Un anciano amablemente cogió la cartera.
translations.fr: Un vieil homme a gentiment pris le portefeuille.
translations.de: Ein alter Mann hat freundlicherweise die Brieftasche aufgehoben.
translations.it: Un vecchio gentilmente prese il portafoglio.
translations.ko: 한 노인이 친절하게 지갑을 집어 들었다.
translations.zh-Hans: 一位老人好心地捡起了钱包。
translations.yue: 有個老人好心咁執起個銀包。
translations.pt: Um velho gentilmente pegou a carteira.
translations.he: איש זקן הרים את הארנק בנדיבות.
translations.tr: Yaşlı bir adam nazikçe cüzdanı aldı.
translations.vi: Một ông già tốt bụng nhặt ví.
translations.nl: Een oude man pakte vriendelijk de portemonnee op.
translations.hu: Egy öregember kedvesen felvette a pénztárcát.
translations.hi: एक बूढ़े आदमी ने प्यार से बटुआ उठाया।
translations.el: Ένας ηλικιωμένος άντρας σήκωσε ευγενικά το πορτοφόλι.
translations.nb: En gammel mann plukket vennlig opp lommeboken.
translations.id: Seorang lelaki tua dengan ramah mengambil dompetnya.
translations.sv: En gammal man plockade vänligt upp plånboken.
translations.ro: Un bătrân a luat portofelul cu amabilitate.
translations.da: En gammel mand tog venligt pungen op.
translations.fi: Vanha mies otti lompakon ystävällisesti käteensä.

tokens.explanation: Refers to the elderly man who performed the action
Marks おじいさん as the subject/doer of the verb
Describes the manner in which the old man acted
Turns 親切 into an adverb modifying して
Te-form of する, connecting to the following verb phrase
Comma separating two related actions
The object that was picked up
Marks 財布 as the direct object of 拾う
Te-form of 拾う connecting to the auxiliary くれる
Expresses that the action was done as a favor to the speaker

sentences.target: 先生は日本語を親切に教えてくれました。
sentences.reading: せんせいはにほんごをしんせつにおしえてくれました。

translations.en: The teacher kindly taught me Japanese.
translations.es: La profesora amablemente me enseñó japonés.
translations.fr: Le professeur m’a gentiment appris le japonais.
translations.de: Der Lehrer hat mir freundlicherweise Japanisch beigebracht.
translations.it: L'insegnante mi ha gentilmente insegnato giapponese.
translations.pt: A professora gentilmente me ensinou japonês.
translations.vi: Giáo viên tốt bụng dạy tôi tiếng Nhật.
translations.nl: De leraar heeft me vriendelijk Japans geleerd.
translations.el: Ο δάσκαλος με δίδαξε ευγενικά ιαπωνικά.
translations.nb: Læreren var så snill å lære meg japansk.
translations.id: Guru dengan ramah mengajari saya bahasa Jepang.
translations.sv: Läraren var vänlig nog att lära mig japanska.
translations.ro: Profesorul m-a învățat cu amabilitate japoneza.
translations.da: Læreren var venlig at lære mig japansk.

tokens.explanation: Refers to the teacher who performed the action
Marks 先生 as the topic of the sentence
The object that was taught
Marks 日本語 as the direct object of 教える
Describes the manner in which the teaching was done
Turns 親切 into an adverb modifying the verb
Te-form of 教える connecting to the auxiliary くれる
Indicates the teacher did the teaching as a favor to the speaker in polite form

sentences.target: あの店員さんは親切な人だ。
sentences.reading: あのてんいんさんはしんせつなひとだ。

translations.en: That clerk is a kind person.
translations.es: Ese empleado es una persona amable.
translations.fr: Ce commis est quelqu’un de gentil.
translations.de: Dieser Angestellte ist ein netter Mensch.
translations.it: Quel commesso è una persona gentile.
translations.pt: Esse atendente é uma pessoa gentil.
translations.vi: Thư ký đó là một người tốt bụng.
translations.nl: Die receptionist is een vriendelijk persoon.
translations.hi: वह क्लर्क एक दयालु व्यक्ति है।
translations.el: Αυτός ο υπάλληλος είναι ένας ευγενικός άνθρωπος.
translations.nb: Den ekspeditøren er en snill person.
translations.id: Petugas itu adalah orang yang baik.
translations.sv: Den där expediten är en snäll person.
translations.ro: Acea funcționară e o persoană bună.
translations.da: Den ekspedient er en venlig person.

tokens.explanation: Specifies which 店員 is being referred to
Refers to the shop staff member
Honorific suffix attached to 店員
Marks the clerk as the topic of the sentence
Describes the nature of the person
Links the na-adjective 親切 to the noun that follows
Predicate noun describing the clerk
States that the topic and predicate are identical

sentences.target: 彼は困っている人に親切にしてあげた。
sentences.reading: かれはこまっているひとにしんせつにしてあげた。

translations.en: He was kind to the person who was in trouble.
translations.es: Fue amable con la persona que estaba en problemas.
translations.fr: Il était gentil avec la personne en difficulté.
translations.de: Er war freundlich zu der Person, die in Schwierigkeiten war.
translations.it: Era gentile con la persona in difficoltà.
translations.zh-Hans: 他对遇到麻烦的人很善良。
translations.ru: Он был добр к тому, кто оказался в беде.
translations.pt: Ele era gentil com a pessoa που estava em apuros.
translations.he: הוא היה אדיב לאדם שהיה בצרה.
translations.tr: Başı belada olan kişiye karşı nazikti.
translations.vi: Anh ấy tử tế với người đang gặp khó khăn.
translations.ar: كان لطيفا مع الشخص الذي كان في ورطة.
translations.nl: Hij was vriendelijk voor degene die in de problemen zat.
translations.uk: Він був добрим до людини, яка потрапила в біду.
translations.hu: Kedves volt ahhoz, aki bajban volt.
translations.hi: वह उस व्यक्ति के प्रति दयालु था जो मुसीबत में था।
translations.pl: Był życzliwy для osoby, która miała kłopoty.
translations.el: Ήταν ευγενικός με το άτομο που είχε πρόβλημα.
translations.nb: Han var snill mot den som var i trøbbel.
translations.id: Dia baik kepada orang yang dalam masalah.
translations.sv: Han был snäll mot den som var i trubbel.
translations.ro: A fost amabil cu persoana care avea probleme.
translations.cs: Byl laskavý k člověku, který měl problémy.
translations.da: Han var venlig mod den, der var i problemer.
translations.fi: Hän oli ystävällinen pulassa olevalle henkilölle.

tokens.explanation: Refers to the male person who performed the action
Marks 彼 as the topic of the sentence
Te-form of 困る indicating the state that connects to いる
Indicates a continuous state of being troubled
The target of kindness, the person in trouble
Marks 人 as the indirect object (the one receiving kindness)
Describes the manner of the action
Turns 親切 into an adverb modifying してあげた
Past form indicating he acted kindly for the benefit of the troubled person

あのみせいんさんはしんせつなひとだ。
かれはこまっているひとにしんせつにした。

The teacher kindly taught me Japanese.
That clerk is a kind person.
He was kind to the person who was in trouble.
